comment: Expected target weights computed and verified in the source spreadsheet (LibreOffice recalc, zero errors). The app's progression engine MUST reproduce these exactly with the placeholder TMs from plan_config.json. Write unit tests against every vector before building UI.

engine_rules.week_type: wq==13 -> test; wq in {4,8,12} -> deload; else build
engine_rules.build_target: mround(TM[lift][q] + (k-1)*increment, round_to), then min(cap) if cap
engine_rules.tm_q_default: TM[q] = TM[q-1] + q_deltas[q-2] (suggestion only; user overrides after test weeks)
engine_rules.mround: round to nearest multiple; ties round up (Excel MROUND behavior)

vectors.note: push press uses same load as strict target

calendar_invariants: start date 2026-06-15 is a Monday; plan spans exactly 364 days (52 weeks)
every one of the 364 days resolves to exactly one session type
sandbag_over_bar appears on build Saturdays only from week 5 onward, never on deload Saturdays
nutrition_invariants: fixed daily template (no dinner) sums to 197 g protein / 2535 kcal from meals.json items tagged fixed_template
7-day dinner rotation weekly average == 237 g protein / ~3308 kcal (tolerance +/- 1 g, +/- 15 kcal from rounding)
no meal in meals.json contains an ingredient on excluded_user or excluded_gout lists
